description: A square designed graphic from U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement promoting an online filing form for attorneys. The right two-thirds of the image is a photograph of a person's hands typing on a silver laptop keyboard, with a smartphone resting on the wooden desk in the foreground; the person wears a light blue-and-white pinstriped collared shirt. The left third is a darkened, desaturated continuation of the photo used as a backdrop for text. Overlaid on the photo, centered-right, is a large white outline illustration of a document/paper with horizontal text lines and an oversized white checkmark, symbolizing form completion/approval. The DHS circular seal appears at the top left next to bold black/grey serif text reading 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement.' Left-aligned white and accent-colored sans-serif text reads: 'SUBMIT' (small), then very large 'DHS FORM' in white, 'G-28' in cyan-blue, then in white with two phrases highlighted in yellow/gold: '"NOTICE OF ENTRY OF APPEARANCE AS ATTORNEY OR ACCREDITED REPRESENTATIVE" WITH ICE ONLINE AT:' followed by 'ICE.gov/eFILE' in white serif. The style is clean corporate-government with a stock-photo background, brand colors of navy/cyan with yellow accents. The messaging is administrative/procedural rather than propagandistic: it is a call-to-action directing immigration attorneys and accredited representatives to file Form G-28 through ICE's online eFile system. Target audience is the legal/immigration-practitioner community.
notable_text: SUBMIT DHS FORM G-28 "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF APPEARANCE AS ATTORNEY OR ACCREDITED REPRESENTATIVE" WITH ICE ONLINE AT: ICE.gov/eFILE
